consent.title: Consent to Data Processing
consent.description: Our application processes personal data, including contact information and answers to symptom-related questions. The data is used for personalization, analytics, and service improvement. The application does not replace a doctor's consultation.
consent.accept_checkbox: I have read and accept the terms
